statics.name: os
statics.description: The current target operating system string used for NDLL resolution (e.g. 'windows', 'linux', 'mac'). Only available if NDLLS_SUPPORTED is defined.

functions.name: getFunction
functions.description: Loads a function from an NDLL using the standard platform-based naming scheme (name-os.ndll). Returns a callable dynamic wrapper supporting up to 25 arguments. If loading fails, returns a no-op function and logs a warning.

functions.name: getFunctionFromPath
functions.description: Loads a function from an NDLL at a specific asset path. Uses lime.system.CFFI.load internally. If the NDLL or function is not found, returns a no-op function and logs an error or warning.

functions.name: noop
functions.description: Internal empty fallback function returned when NDLL loading or function resolution fails.
